command: pixverse create reference --model v6 --quality 720p --duration 8 --aspect-ratio 9:16 --images /tmp/hc_moche_head_vessel_source.jpg --no-audio --prompt 'Use the reference image as the exact Moche Head Vessel. Make an 8-second vertical social media motion clip: a slow, deliberate push-in from the full ceramic face toward the eyes, with subtle parallax and a gentle light pass revealing clay texture. Preserve the black-and-white museum-photo look and the vessel'"'"'s identity. The object remains fired clay, still and sculptural. No blinking, no mouth movement, no facial expression change, no extra objects, no hands, no text, no logo, no captions, no colorization, no morphing, no warping. End on a close, watchful crop of the eyes.'
label: final motion render

invoice.source: asset_ledger actual_credits from create/status/asset info/account usage; observed delta from account balance snapshots

notes: Basic/Free membership detected. Video routes should use PixVerse v6 and image routes should use Qwen Image. For advanced models and higher-end effects, open the PixVerse subscription page with `/Users/samb/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/pixverse/1.1.1/scripts/pvx pixverse subscribe`.
Exact credits are not available before generation; show task count, model/key parameters, and balance state, then ask for confirmation.
First paid generation for this project always requires explicit user confirmation.

After approving this first generation, to make later batches in this project run after preflight without stopping, use `/Users/samb/.codex/plugins/cache/openai-curated-remote/pixverse/1.1.1/scripts/pvx preferences quote-confirmation skip --project human-collective-moche-reel`.

pricing_sources.official_readme: PixVerse CLI uses the same credit system as the website; exact pre-generation price may not be available for every task.
